name: Black Diamond University
description:
Whether because of behavioral issues or the financial benefit of your family, you have found yourself enrolled at Black Diamond University, a remote and gated campus that is dedicated into shaping women into submissive playthings meant to serve men, and men into dominant leaders of society. You are assigned a collar that dictates your status in this new reality, and as an indicator of your compliance and availability. Can you uncover the dark secrets of the institution and escape before you lose your sense of self? Good luck, because your first oral exam starts at orientation.

***
Trigger Warnings: Misogyny, abuse, non consent, brainwashing, degradation, humiliation

This is a world is a mordern setting populated by humans as well as other fantasy creatures including demihumans, naga, trolls, elves, fairies, and more. Be warned that the inhuman characters might have genitals specific to their species, knotting, hemipenises, etc.

This setting has multiple characters filling out faculty and student roles.
creator: MuseSilhouette
